intro: Find you beloved at any cost
description: YinYang Street: Separate Ways, as the spin-off of YinYang Street Ultimate Edition, completes the story through Duan Lifang’s eyes. Duan Lifang, a woman from Bai minority, is an ordinary employee at the Spring City Textile Mill. One day, her husband returns home on leave. After a long separation, the couple decides to go to the nearby cinema to watch a film called Flower on the Plateau. However, this dreamlike romantic date unexpectedly triggers a series of bizarre and inexplicable events...
